projectRoot: /Volumes/star/claude/AI Agent x Web3 开启你的第一桶赏金

docs.purpose: Project directory, module, and important-file map.
docs.readWhen: Before structural changes or broad feature work.
docs.updateTrigger: Directories, entry points, modules, or important files change.
docs.validation: Paths reflect current repository.

docs.purpose: Current plan, next actions, risks, and milestones.
docs.readWhen: Before planning or resuming work.
docs.updateTrigger: Plans, priorities, milestones, or risks change.
docs.validation: Next actions are current and actionable.

docs.purpose: BountyProof data flow, module boundaries, contract and security invariants.
docs.readWhen: Before changing scoring, hashing, KeeperHub or contract boundaries.
docs.updateTrigger: Evidence model or execution changes.
docs.validation: Unit and contract tests pass.

docs.purpose: Nox strategy packing, encrypted handle flow, ACL and wallet boundaries.
docs.readWhen: Before changing Nox, wallet, decrypt or deployment behavior.
docs.updateTrigger: Nox SDK, ABI, encoding or network changes.
docs.validation: Contract/unit/build checks pass.

docs.purpose: Workspace UX, states, responsive and acceptance behavior.
docs.readWhen: Before UI or interaction changes.
docs.updateTrigger: Screen behavior or score presentation changes.
docs.validation: Three target viewports pass.

docs.purpose: Opportunity and proof preview API contracts.
docs.readWhen: Before routes, client errors or payload changes.
docs.updateTrigger: API contract changes.
docs.validation: Types, tests and HTTP smoke pass.

docs.purpose: Official KeeperHub snapshot and submission plan.
docs.readWhen: Before registration, integration or submission.
docs.updateTrigger: Official rules change.
docs.validation: Official sources rechecked.

docs.purpose: Official WTF/Nox snapshot, build scope and submission checklist.
docs.readWhen: Before Nox deployment, public release, video or submission.
docs.updateTrigger: Rules, deliverables or submission status changes.
docs.validation: Official sources and public evidence rechecked.

docs.purpose: KeeperHub product wedge, demo arc and judging-risk strategy.
docs.readWhen: Before feature prioritization, demo recording or submission.
docs.updateTrigger: Judging rules or product narrative changes.
docs.validation: Strategies map to official criteria and real evidence.

docs.purpose: Local commands and human-gated Sepolia path.
docs.readWhen: Before build or testnet deployment.
docs.updateTrigger: Toolchain or deployment changes.
docs.validation: Build passes; deployment evidence when approved.

docs.purpose: Why KeeperHub is the first competition.
docs.readWhen: Before replacing the first target.
docs.updateTrigger: Competition priority changes.
docs.validation: New official evidence and ADR required.

docs.purpose: Why KeeperHub simulation and real broadcast are separate human-gated phases.
docs.readWhen: Before changing KeeperHub execution, credentials, wallet or broadcast boundaries.
docs.updateTrigger: Direct Execution or broadcast model changes.
docs.validation: Tests prove the default path cannot broadcast.

docs.purpose: Known issues and recurring problems.
docs.readWhen: Before debugging or risk review.
docs.updateTrigger: New recurring issue or resolved issue.
docs.validation: Issues include status and validation.

docs.purpose: Durable project progress log.
docs.readWhen: Before handoff or project review.
docs.updateTrigger: Meaningful project state changes.
docs.validation: Entries link to relevant docs or files.

docs.purpose: Technical debt and cleanup candidates.
docs.readWhen: Before refactors or planning.
docs.updateTrigger: Debt is found, resolved, or reprioritized.
docs.validation: Items have impact and owner/status.

docs.purpose: Project memory evidence and invalidation rules.
docs.readWhen: Before adding evidence, source hashes, retrieval records, or invalidations.
docs.updateTrigger: Evidence schema, retrieval index, or invalidation policy changes.
docs.validation: Evidence JSONL and invalidation JSONL parse correctly.

docs.purpose: Machine-readable project memory retrieval index.
docs.readWhen: Before summarizing or routing project memory reads.
docs.updateTrigger: Durable docs, summaries, or memory routes change.
docs.validation: JSON parses and paths exist or are marked missing.

docs.purpose: Evidence records for durable project memory and KG entries.
docs.readWhen: Before verifying durable memory claims.
docs.updateTrigger: New durable memory or KG evidence is recorded.
docs.validation: Each non-empty line is valid JSON with required fields.

docs.purpose: Invalidated or superseded memory records.
docs.readWhen: Before trusting old project facts.
docs.updateTrigger: Project facts, graph nodes, docs, APIs, or modules are superseded.
docs.validation: Each non-empty line is valid JSON with required fields.

docs.purpose: Knowledge graph node, edge, evidence, and validation schema.
docs.readWhen: Before creating or updating graph relationships.
docs.updateTrigger: Graph schema or validation rules change.
docs.validation: Schema matches project-graph.json.

docs.purpose: Machine-readable project relationship graph.
docs.readWhen: Before impact analysis or cross-layer work.
docs.updateTrigger: Feature, module, file, API, DB, test, ADR, or risk relationships change.
docs.validation: All nodes and edges have evidence.

docs.purpose: Human-readable graph summary and activation notes.
docs.readWhen: Before relationship lookup or handoff.
docs.updateTrigger: project-graph.json changes.
docs.validation: Summary reflects current graph.
